2196300.name: GrassGames Hearts 3
2196300.description:
GrassGames' Hearts is a beautiful 3D computer game version of the popular Hearts card game for 3 or 4 players.

Main Features:

- Play locally, online, or over your home network
- "American", "Omnibus Hearts" and "Black Maria" variants included
- Intelligent Computer opponents
- Online rankings system
- Replays & Statistics
2196300.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
